author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
How Disney Built a New Smugglers Run Mission Featuring The Mandalorian & Grogu | Disney Unscripted
Go behind the scenes of an all-new mission featuring the Mandalorian and Grogu, now accepting recruits aboard Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run at Disneyland Park and Disney's Hollywood Studios.

In this episode of Disney Unscripted, discover how cast members team up with Walt Disney Imagineering and Lucasfilm to bring the Mandalorian and Grogu into the cockpit of the fastest hunk of junk in the galaxy. From story development and sound design to new tasks for Pilots, Gunners and Engineers, see how this thrilling new adventure expands the Star Wars experience at Disneyland Resort and Walt Disney World Resort.

This is the way. 🚀

SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ
